title: End-to-end user journey through feedback submission, general app settings (licenses and privacy policy), and notifications configuration
scenario: User navigates Poly Studio Mobile app main menu on no-device page to access feedback, general settings (licenses, privacy policy), and notifications/device alerts configuration
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Observe the Home screen with the 'No Device Connected' message displayed.
3. Tap the hamburger menu icon (three horizontal lines) in the top-left corner to open the main navigation menu.
4. From the main menu, tap 'Send Feedback' to open the feedback submission screen.
5. Enter text in the feedback field and optionally attach a screenshot or log, then tap 'Submit' to send feedback.
6. Return to the main menu by tapping the hamburger menu icon again.
7. Tap 'Settings' to open the General App Settings screen.
8. In the Settings screen, tap 'Licenses' to view open-source software licenses.
9. Tap the back arrow to return to the Settings screen.
10. Tap 'Privacy Policy' to view the Poly privacy policy document.
11. Tap the back arrow to return to the Settings screen.
12. Tap 'Notifications' to open the Notifications/Device Alerts configuration screen.
13. Verify the available notification toggles (e.g., 'Low Battery Alert', 'Connection Alerts', 'Call Alerts').
14. Toggle one or more notification settings ON or OFF as desired.
15. Tap the back arrow to return to the Settings screen, then navigate back to the Home screen.
expected: The user can successfully navigate through the main menu to submit feedback, view licenses and privacy policy in General Settings, and configure notification/device alert toggles. All screens load correctly and settings persist after navigating away and back.
